meta.book: The Formula Book of English — Gopal Verma
meta.author: Gopal Verma (Rakesh Yadav Readers Publication)
meta.note: Printed English grammar formula book (Gopal Verma), transcribed into structured study notes (Master Formulas as rules/tables, rules, examples). Front-matter pages (1-6) are is_cover and skipped. Chapters = the book's own Content page. Original page scan stays available per page.

blocks.text: 01 Tense

A set of verb forms that indicate a particular point in time or period of time in past, present or Future is called a tense./ क्रिया का रूप जिससे समय को Present, Past और Future में व्यक्त किया जाता है उसे Tense कहते है।
**Tense** तीन प्रकार के होते है:- 1. Present Tense 2. Past Tence 3. Future Tense
1. Present Tense
A. Present Indefinite Tense:-
इस Tense का प्रयोग वर्तमान में चलने वाले स्थायी कार्य के लिए होता है:
Master Formulas

rows: Sub + Do/ Does + not + V₁ + obj.

blocks.text: Present Indifinite Tense का प्रयोग इन परिस्थितियों में करें:-
जब नियमित क्रिया (Regular action) की बात हो, तो Present Indifinite Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- (i) He plays cricket daily.
(ii) He goes there every day.

blocks.text: जब अनियमित क्रिया (Irregular action) की बात हो तो Preset Indifinite Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- (i) He often goes to market.
(ii) Earthquake comes in Japan.

blocks.text: जब किसी के वर्तमान की आदत (Present habit) की बात हो तो Present Indifinite Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- (i) He smokes daily.
(ii) He collects coins.

blocks.text: जब सार्वभौमिक सत्य (Universal Truth) की बात हो तो Present Indifinite Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- (i) The sun rises in the East.
(ii) Two and two makes four

blocks.text: जब नाटक (Drama or play) की बात हो तो Present Indefinite Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- Akbar talks to Birbal on the stage

blocks.text: जब अखबार की सुर्खी (Newspaper Headline) की बात हो तो Present Indifinite Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- India wins the match by 20 runs as it is given in the headline of a newspaper.

blocks.text: जब किसी खेल का आंखों देखा वर्णन (Sports commentary) की बात हो तो Present Indefinite Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- Kohli hits the ball and the ball goes to the boundary.

blocks.text: जब स्थायी संरचना (Permanent structure) की बात हो तो Present Indefinite Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- My house faces the East.

blocks.text: जब भविष्य के किसी निश्चित योजना (Fixed Programme) की बात हो तो Present Indefinit Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- Ram returns from Delhi this week.

blocks.text: जब exclamatory sentence की शुरूआत Here or There से हो तो Present Indefinite Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- Here comes my son!

blocks.text: जब हम किसी Book के कथन (quote) को कहते है तो Present Indefinite Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- Shakespeare says, "A man can die but once".

blocks.text: जब अधिकार (Possession/ ownership) की बात हो तो Present Indefinite Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- Sangita owns a big house.

blocks.text: B. Present Continuous Tense
इस Tense का प्रयोग हमारे बोलने के समय के कार्यों के लिए होता है।
Master Formulas

rows: Sub + is/am/are + not + v₁ + ing + obj

blocks.text: Present Continuous Tense का प्रयोग इन परिस्थितियों में करें:-
अस्थायी कार्य (Temporary action) के लिए Present Continuous Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- I am teaching maths these days.

blocks.text: किसी चीज में लगातार परिवर्तन (Continuous change) के लिए Present Continuous Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- The forest area is decreasing day by day.

blocks.text: किसी की वर्तमान की आदत से जब हमें नाराजगी या गुस्सा आये तो Present Continuous Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- Nitu is always disturbing me.

blocks.text: निकट भविष्य (Near future) के कार्य के लिए Present Continuous Tense का प्रयोग कर सकते हैं।

items.text: Example:- I am going to his house tomorrow.

blocks.text: Hear का अर्थ अगर सुनना हो तो इसका प्रयोग Continuous Tense में नहीं होता लेकिन यदि hear का अर्थ court case की सुनवाई हो तो Continuous Tense का प्रयोग करे।

items.text: Example:- (i) The jury is hearing the case.
(ii) I hear the news

blocks.text: See का अर्थ यदि देखना हो तो Continuous Tense का प्रयोग ना करें लेकिन see का अर्थ यदि मिलना (meet) हो तो Continuous Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- (i) I see the movie.
(ii) I am seeing my friend tomorrow.

blocks.text: Feel का अर्थ यदि महसूस करना हो तो Continuous Tense का प्रयोग न करें लेकिन यदि Feel का अर्थ नब्ज का परिक्षण (To check pulse) या किसी चीज को टटोल कर खोजना हो (To search by touching everything) हो तो Continuous Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- (i) I feel your pain.
(ii) The doctor was feeling my pulse.
(iii) He was feeling for the electric switch in the dark.

blocks.text: Think का प्रयोग Coninuous Tense में नहीं करते लेकिन यदि Think के बाद to/ of या about लिखा हो तो Continuous Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- (i) I think that you are right.
(ii) I am thinking to go there.

blocks.text: Have का प्रयोग Continuous Tense में नहीं करते लेकिन यदि Have का अर्थ खाना-खाना (Eat food) या मस्ती करना (to enjoy) हो तो Continuous Tense का प्रयोग करे।

items.text: Example:- (i) She has a nice car.
(ii) She is having a cake.

blocks.text: Appear का प्रयोग Continuous Tense में नहीं करते लेकिन यदि Appear का अर्थ किताब प्रकाशित कराना (To publish book), प्रकट होना (To come suddenly) या परीक्षा देना (exam) हो तो Continuous Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- (i) She is appearing in the exam.
(ii) I am appearing my book.

blocks.text: C. Present Perfect Tense
Present Parfect Tense का प्रयोग अभी-अभी समाप्त हुए कार्यों के लिए करें।
Master Formulas
Present Perfect Tense का प्रयोग इन परिस्थितियों में करें:-
Lately का प्रयोग सिर्फ Present Perfect Tense में करें।

items.text: Example:- I have seen my friend lately.

blocks.text: Already का प्रयोग तीनों Perfect Tense में कर सकते है।

items.text: Example:- (i) She has already done it.
(ii) Ram had already helped me.
(ii) We will already have done our work.

blocks.text: Yet का प्रयोग सिर्फ Present Perfect Tense के negative sentence में करें।

items.text: Example:- Rakesh has not spoken the truth yet.

blocks.text: Recently का प्रयोग सिर्फ Present Perfect Tense और Past Indefinit Tense में कर सकते है।

items.text: Example:- (i) She has done it recently.
(ii) I helped her recently.

blocks.text: Present perfect + since + past Indefinite or since + past Indefinite, Present Perfect Tense.

items.text: Example:- (i) I have not seen her since she left India.
(ii) Since he cheated us, we have not talked to him.

blocks.text: Just का प्रयोग Present prefect Tence में करते हैं।

items.text: Example:- I have Just asked the question.

blocks.text: It is the first time, It is the second time, It is the only time etc. के बाद सिर्फ Present Perfect Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- It is the first time that we have seen such an interesting movie.

blocks.text: जब कार्य (Action) महत्वपूर्ण हो ना कि उसका समय (Time) तब Present Perfect Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- I have bought a car.

blocks.text: So far का प्रयोग Present Perfect Tense में करते है।

items.text: Example:- Bokla has not done his work so far.

blocks.text: Ever (अब तक किसी समय) का प्रयोग Present perfect Tense में करते हैं।

items.text: Example:- Have you ever seen an aeroplane?

blocks.text: D. Present Perfect Continuous Tense:-
एक कार्य जो Past में शुरू हुआ था और अभी भी चल रहा है उसे Present Perfect Continuous में लिखते है।
Master Formula

rows: sub + has/have + been + v₁ + ing + obj + since/For + time
sub + has/have + not + been + v₁ + ing + obj + since/For + time
Has/Have + sub + been + v₁ + ing + obj + since/For + time ?

blocks.text: Use of since/For
**'Since'** is used for point of time
(e.g. since sunday, since 2001, Since Holi, Since 5 PM, Since Summer, Since marriage, Since last week, Since childhood etc.)
**'For'** is used for 'duration of time'
(e.g. for two hours, For many years, For a long time, For last five weeks etc.)
Note:- तीनों Perfect Continuous Tense में mainly questions since या For से आता है।
Duration of time के साथ Since का प्रयोग करे यदि उसके बाद Ago लिखा हो।

items.text: Example:- I have been doing it Since five days ago.

blocks.text: यदि duration of time के पहले all या the whole लिखा हो तो Since या For दोनों का प्रयोग ना करे।

items.text: Example:- It has been raining all day.

blocks.text: सामान्यत: long, how long, all the time, all day, all week etc. के साथ Perfect Contonuous Tense का प्रयोग करते है।

items.text: Example:- How long has Rakhi been waiting for me?

blocks.text: E. Past Indefinite Tense
जो कार्य Past में खत्म हो गया था उनके लिए Past Indefinite Tense का प्रयोग करते है।
Master Formula
इन परिस्थितियों में Past Indifinite Tence का प्रयोग करे:-
सामान्यत: यदि किसी Sentence की शुरूआत Past Indefinite Tense से हो तो आगे भी वह Past Tense में रहेगा।

items.text: Example:- He told me that he would help me.

blocks.text: यदि किसी वाक्य की शुरूआत It is time, It is high time, It is right time etc. से हो और उसके बाद एक Subject हो, तो उसके बाद V₂ का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- It is high time Ram went to market.

blocks.text: Sub + __had rather/had better__ / would rather/world better + V₁ (Bare Infinitive).

items.text: Example:- She had better do it.

blocks.text: Sub(1) + __had better/had rather__ / would better/would rather + Sub(2) + V₂

items.text: Example:- Ravi had better sita did the work.

blocks.text: Ago का प्रयोग Past Indefinite Tense में करें।

items.text: Example:- Bokla met Agnes 15 years ago.

blocks.text: Just now का प्रयोग Past Indefinite Tense में करें।

items.text: Example:- She just now heard the news.

blocks.text: सामान्यत: यदि Sentence में Past के किसी भी Word (e.g. last day, yesterday, that day, the previous day etc.) का प्रयोग हो तो Past Indefinite Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- She bought a pen yesterday.

blocks.text: Past के किसी भी invention (अविष्कार) या discovery (खोज) को Past Indefinite Tense में लिखे।

items.text: Example:- Columbus discovered America.

blocks.text: Past के किसी आदत (habit) को व्यक्त करने के लिए Past Indefinite Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- He used to play chess daily.

blocks.text: Past की स्थिति (situation) को बताने के लिए Past Indefinit Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- Gandhi Ji was a great leader.

blocks.text: F. Past Continuous Tense
जो कार्य Past में चल रहा था उसे Past Continuous Tense में लिखते हैं।
Master Formulas

rows: sub + was/ were + not + v₁ + ing + obj
was/ were + sub + v₁ + ing + obj?

blocks.text: इन परिस्थितियों में Past Continuous Tense का प्रयोग करें:-
Past में जब दो कार्य एक साथ एक समय पर हुए थे तब Past Continuous Tense का प्रयोग करे।

items.text: Example:- While Rakesh was studying, Nitu was singing.

blocks.text: Past में जब कोई कार्य चल रहा था और उसी बीच में दूसरा कार्य हो गया था तो पहले कार्य को Past Continuous Tense में लिखे और दूसरे कार्य को Past Indefinite Tense में लिखे।

items.text: Example:- While I was Studying, my father went.

blocks.text: G. Past Perfect Tense
वह कार्य जो Past Indifinite Tense से भी पहले हुआ था उसे Past Perfect Tense कहते हैं। Or, एक कार्य जो Past में एक निश्चित समय में खत्म हो गया था उसे Past Perfect Tense कहते हैं।
Master Formulas
इन परिस्थितियों में Past Perfect Tense का प्रयोग करें:-
दो कार्य जब Past में एक के बाद एक हुए थे तब पहले कार्य को Past Perfect Tense में लिखे और दूसरे कार्य को Past Indifinite Tense में लिखें।

items.text: Example:- Before I reached the station, the train had gone.

blocks.text: यदि Past के hope, wish, think या intend (इरादा) अधूरे रह जाए तो Past Perfect Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- I had hoped to meet my friend yesterday but I fell ill.

blocks.text: Hardly/Scarcely — When/Before
इस formula में hardly/scarcely वाले Part में Past perfect Tense का प्रयोग करते है और when/ Before वाले Part में Past Indefinite Tense का प्रयोग करते है।

items.text: Example:- Hardly had I spoken when she came.

blocks.text: H. Past Perfect Continuous Tense
एक कार्य जो Past में शुरू हुआ था, चला था, खत्म भी हो गया था और जिसमें समय का भी वर्णन हो उसे Past perfect Continuous Tense कहते हैं।
Master Formulas

rows: sub + had + been + v₁ + ing + obj + since / For + Time
sub + had + not + been + v₁ + ing +obj + since/For + Time
Had + sub + been + v₁ + ing + obj + since/ For + Time?

blocks.text: इन परिस्थितियों में Past Perfect Continuous Tense का प्रयोग करें:-
एक कार्य जो Past में कुछ समय से चल रहा था उसे Past Perfect Continuous Tense में लिखे।

items.text: Example:- Bandana had been playing since morning.

blocks.text: Past के किसी repeated action के लिए Past Perfect Continuous Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- Agnes had been trying to attract me for sometimes.

blocks.text: I. Future Indefinite Tense
एक कार्य जो भविष्य में होगा उसे Future Indefinite Tense में लिखते हैं।
Master Formulas
इन परिस्थितियों में Future Indefinite Tense का प्रयोग करें:-
सामान्यत: सभी Subjects के साथ will का प्रयोग करते हैं लेकिन Interrogative Sentence में I/we के साथ सिर्फ 'shall' का प्रयोग करे।

items.text: Example:- shall we play cricket?

blocks.text: यदि determination (दृढ़ निश्चय), Threat (धमकी), Promise (वादा) या advice (सलाह) की बात हो तो I/we के साथ will का प्रयोग करें और अन्य सभी subjects के साथ 'shall' का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- (i) I will kill you.
(ii) Ram shall do it at any cost.

blocks.text: भविष्य के स्वाभाविक (natural) कार्य को Future indefinite Tense में लिखें।

items.text: Example:- We will grow old.

blocks.text: Order (आदेश) या instruction (निर्देश) को व्यक्त करने के लिए Future Indefinit Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- Our institute shall remain closed on Tuesday.

blocks.text: J. Future Continuous Tense
एक कार्य जो भविष्य में चल रहा होगा उसे Future Continuous Tense में लिखते है।
Master Formulas

rows: sub + shall/will + be + v₁ + ing + obj
sub + shall/will + not + be + v₁ + ing + obj
will/ shall + sub + be + v₁ + ing + obj?

blocks.text: इन परिस्थितियों में Future Continuous Tense का प्रयोग करें:-
भविष्य के tempory action or plan (अस्थायी कार्य या योजना) को Future Continuous Tense में लिखें।

items.text: Example:- Ravi will be going to Mumbai next month.

blocks.text: भविष्य के habit (आदत) के लिए Future Continuous Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- Sangit will be making the same mistake again.

blocks.text: K. Future perfect Tense
एक कार्य जो भविष्य में एक निश्चित समय में खत्म हो जायेगा उसे Future perfect Tense में लिखते हैं।
Master Formulas

rows: sub + shall / will + not + have + v₃ + obj.
will/ shall + sub + have + v₃ + obj ?

blocks.text: इन परिस्थितियों में Future Perfect Tense का प्रयोग करें।
जब दो कार्य भविष्य में एक के बाद एक होंगे तब पहले कार्य को Future Perfect Tense में लिखे और दूसरे कार्य को Present Indefinite Tense में लिखे।

items.text: Example:- when I reach kolkata, they will have left for America.

blocks.text: एक कार्य जब भविष्य में एक निश्चित समय में खत्म हो जायेगा तब Future Perfect Tense का प्रयोग करे।

items.text: Example:- He will have done the work by the end of next month.

blocks.text: L. Future Perfect Continuous Tense
एक कार्य जो भविष्य में कुछ समय से चल रहा होगा उसे Future Perfect Continuous Tense में लिखे।
Master Formulas

rows: sub + shall/will + have +been + v₁ + ing + obj + From/For + obj
sub + shall/ will + not + have + been + v₁ + ing + obj + From/ For + obj
shall/ will + sub + have + been + v₁ + ing + obj + From/ For + obj ?

blocks.text: इस परिस्थितियों में Future Perfect Continuous Tense का प्रयोग करें।
एक कार्य जो भविष्य में कुछ समय से चल रहा होगा तो Future Perfect Continuous Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- I will have been helping her for sometimes.

blocks.text: Tense के कुछ Miscellaneous Rules
लगातार बदलाव (constant chanse) के लिए Present Continuous Tense का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Example:- The number of students in this school is increasing.

blocks.text: किसी भी Continuous Tense में समय (Time) का प्रयोग बिल्कुल ना करें।

items.text: Example:- (i) She is playing for two hours (✗)
(ii) She has been playing for two hours.(✓)

blocks.text: Today, this morning, this evening, this week, this month, this year इत्यादि के साथ Past Indefinite Tense और Present Perfect Tense दोनों का प्रयोग कर सकते है।

items.text: Example:- (i) I did it today.
(ii) I have done it today.

blocks.text: 'Once' और 'Once upon a time' का प्रयोग Past Indefinite Tense में करें।

items.text: Example:- (i) she helped me once.
(i) Once upon a time there lived a king.

blocks.text: 'As soon as' के साथ Past Perfect Tense और Past Indefinite Tense दोनों का प्रयोग कर सकते हैं।

items.text: Example:- (i) As soon as Ram spoke, they went.
(ii) As soon as Ram had spoken, they went.

blocks.text: सामान्यत: इन Adverbs का प्रयोग Present Indefinite Tense में करते हैं:- Usually, generally, hardly ever, every day, every Sunday, twice a year etc.

items.text: Example:- she comes here every day.

blocks.text: 02 Voice

When somebody does something or the effect of that thing is received by someone or something, it is called voice.
जब कोई व्यक्ति कुछ कार्य करे और उस कार्य का असर किसी अन्य व्यक्ति या वस्तु पर पड़े तो उसे Voice कहते है।
**Voice** दो प्रकार के होते है:-
1. **Active voice**- जब हम कार्य स्वयं करते है तो उसे active voice कहते है।

items.text: Example:- Ram does the work.

blocks.text: 2. **Passive voice**- जब कार्य स्वयं नहीं हो सकता और हमें किसी व्यक्ति की जरूरत हो उस कार्य को करने के लिए जब Passive Voice का प्रयोग करते है।

items.text: Example:- The work is dome by Ram.

blocks.text: **VOICE** के **Most Important Rules**
Rule -1
Present Indefinite Tense
Av – sub + v₁ + obj  |  Pv – obj + is/am/are + v₃ + by + sub

items.text:
Av – I Play chess.
Pv – chess is played by me.

blocks.text: Rule-2
Present Continuous Tense
Av – sub + is / am / are + v₁ + ing + obj.  |  Pv – obj + is / am / are + being + v₃ + by + sub

items.text:
Av – Babu is singing a song.
Pv – A song is being sung by babu.

blocks.text: Rule-3
Present perfect Tense
Av – sub + has /have + v₃ + obj  |  Pv – obj + has/ have + been + v₃ + by + sub.

items.text:
Av – we have spoken the truth.
Pv – The truth has been spoken by us.

blocks.text: Rule-4
Past Indefinite Tense
Av – sub + v₂ + obj  |  Pv – obj + was / were + v₃ + by + sub

items.text:
Av – I did it.
Pv – It was done by me.

blocks.text: Rule-5
Past Continuous Tense
Av – sub + was/ were + v₁ + ing + obj  |  Pv – obj + was / were + being + v₃ + by + sub

items.text:
Av – Rakhi was helping Rani.
Pv – Rani was being helped by Rakhi.

blocks.text: Rule-6
Past Perfect Tense
Av – sub + had + v₃ + obj  |  Pv – obj + had + been + v₃ + by + sub

items.text:
Av – Rashmi had asked the question.
Pv – The question had been asked by Rashmi.

blocks.text: Rule-7
Future Indefinite Tense
Av – sub + shall/ will + v₁ + obj  |  Pv – obj + shall/ will + be + v₃ + by + sub.

items.text:
Av – He will help me.
Pv – I will be helped by him.

blocks.text: Rule-8
Future Perfect Tense
Av – sub + shall/ will + have + v₃ + obj  |  Pv – obj + shall/ will + have + been+v₃ +by + sub

items.text:
Av – Gyan will have done the work.
Pv – The work will have been done by Gyan.

blocks.text: Rule-9

items.text:
Av – who helped me?
Pv – By whom was I helped?

Av – whom do you blame?
Pv – who is blamed by you ?

blocks.text: Rule-10
Av – sub + modal + v₁ + obj  |  Pv – obj + modal + be + v₃ + by + sub

items.text:
Av – Ram can help her.
Pv – She can be helped by Ram.

blocks.text: Rule-11
Av – It is time + to + v₁ + obj  |  Pv – It is time + For + obj + to + be + v₃

items.text:
Av – It is time to ring the bell.
Pv – It is time for the bell to be rung.

blocks.text: Rule-12
Av – There + Be (Form) + obj + to + v₁  |  Pv – There + Be (Form) + obj + to + be + v₃

items.text:
Av – There is no movie to see.
Pv – There is no movie to be seen.

blocks.text: Rule-13
Av – sub + want/ Like + to + v₁ + obj  |  Pv – sub + want / Like + obj + to + be + v₃

items.text:
Av – she wants to kill you.
Pv – she wants you to be killed.

blocks.text: Rule-14
Imperative Sentence (आदेशात्मक वाक्य)
A v - verb + obj  |  Pv –(a) Let + obj + be + v₃  (b) you are ordered + to + v₁ + obj  (c) you are advised + to + v₁ + obj  (d) you are requested + to + v₁ + obj

items.text:
Av – close the door.
Pv – Let the door be closed
or
you are ordered to close the door.

blocks.text: Rule-15
Av – sub + verb + adjective  |  Pv – sub + Be (Form) + Adjective + when + pronoun + Be (Form) + v₃

items.text:
Av – Rose smells sweet.
Pv – Rose is sweet when it is smelt.

blocks.text: Rule-16
यदि active voice में verb के साथ कोई Preposition हो, तो Passive voice में उसी preposition का प्रयोग v₃ के बाद करें।
Formula
Av – sub + verb + preposition + obj  |  Pv – obj + Be (Form) + v₃ + preposition + by + sub

items.text:
Av – she laughed at me.
Pv – I was laughed at by her.

blocks.text: Rule-17
इन **verbs** के साथ **Passive voice** में **by + sub** का प्रयोग ना करें:-
Contained in, disgusted with, annoyed at, annoyed with, satisfied with, pleased with, shocked at offended with, engulfed in, interested in etc.

items.text:
Av – your speech annoyed me.
Pv – I was annoyed at your speech.

Av – His words shocked me.
Pv – I was shocked at his words

blocks.text: Rule- 18
Av – sub + hope / wish / expect + to + v₁ + obj  |  Pv – It + Be (Form) + hoped/ wished/ expected + by + sub + to + v₁ + obj

items.text:
Av – I hope to win the match.
Pv – It is hoped by me to win the match.

blocks.text: Rule-19
Av – sub₍₁₎ + remember/see + sub₍₂₎ + v₁ + ing + obj  |  Pv – sub₍₁₎ + remember/see + being + v₃ + ---+by+ sub₍₂₎

items.text:
Av – I remember my mother taking me to hospital.
Pv – I remember being taken to hospital by my mother.

blocks.text: Rule-20
Av – Get + sub + to + v₁ + obj  |  Pv – Get + obj + v₃ + by + sub

items.text:
Av – Get Ravi to do it.
Pv – Get it done by Ravi.

blocks.text: Rule-21
Av – Have + sub + v₁ + obj  |  Pv – Have + obj + v₃ + by + sub

items.text:
Av – Have Ram do it.
Pv – Have it done by Ram.

blocks.text: Rule-22
Av – sub + Be (Form) + going/coming + to + v₁ + obj  |  Pv – obj +Be (Form)+going/coming +to+be+v₃+by+sub

items.text:
Av – He is going to do it.
Pv – It is going to be done by him.

blocks.text: Rule-23
Av – sub + has to / have to/ had to + v₁  |  Pv – sub + Be (Form) + obliged/compelled+to + v₁

items.text:
Av – I have to speak.
Pv – I am obliged to speak.

blocks.text: Rule-24
Av – sub + has to/ have to/ had to + v₁ + obj  |  Pv – obj+has to/have to/had to+be+v₃+by+sub

items.text:
Av – I have to speak the truth.
Pv – The truth has to be spoken by me.

blocks.text: Rule-25
Av – Let + us + v₁ + ---  |  Pv – It is suggested + that + we + should + v₁ + ---

items.text:
Av – Let us go there.
Pv – It is suggested that we shold go there.

blocks.text: Rule-26
Av – Let + me / him / her/ you/ it/ them/ name + v₁ + ---  |  Pv – I / He/ she/ you/ It/ They/Name + might be allowed/may be allowed to + v₁ + ---

items.text:
Av – Let him go there.
Pv – He might be allowed to go there.

blocks.text: Rule-27
यदि Sentence में दो Objects हो तो दोनों से Passive voice बना सकते हैं लेकिन First object ज्यादा बेहतर होता है।

items.text:
Av – The sun gives us light.
Pv – (1) we are given light by the sun.
(2) Light is given to us by the sun.

blocks.text: Rule-28
Passive voice में इन Words का प्रयोग subject के रूप में करने से बचें:-
People, police, public, court, judge, you, them, teacher, one , someone, anyone, everyone, noone, everybody, somebody, nobody, anybody ete,

items.text:
Av – Everybody helped me.
Pv – I was helped.

blocks.text: Rule-29
Optative sentence का Passive voice इस प्रकार बनायें:-
Av – may God + v₁ + obj  |  Pv – It is wished / blessed + that + sub + may + v₁ + ------

items.text:
Av – May God bless you!
Pv – It is wished that God may bless you.

blocks.text: Rule-30
Moral suggestion (नैतिक सलाह) के लिए Passive voice में 'should' का प्रयोग करें।

items.text:
Av – Love your country.
Pv – your country should be loved.

blocks.text: Rule-31
Av – sub + love/ like + Gerund + obj  |  Pv – obj+Be(Form)+loved/liked+being+v₃+ by + sub

items.text:
Av – I love playing chess.
Pv – chess is loved being played by me.

blocks.text: Rule-32
Av – sub + modal + have + v₃ + obj  |  Pv – obj+ modal + have + been + v₃ + by + sub

items.text:
Av – Ravi should have helped me.
Pv – I should have been helped by Ravi.

blocks.text: Rule-33
Av – sub+has/have+had+obj  |  Pv – obj+has/have+been + had+by+sub

items.text:
Av – she has had meal.
Pv – Meal has been had by her.

blocks.text: Rule-34
Av – sub+see/watch/hear+obj₍₁₎+v₁ +obj₍₂₎  |  Pv – obj₍₁₎ + Be (Form) + seen/ watched/ heard + to+v₁+ obj₍₂₎ + by + sub

items.text:
Av – I saw her watch T V .
Pv – she was seen to watch T V by me.

blocks.text: Rule-35
Av – sub+see/watch/hear+obj₍₁₎+v₍₁₎+ ing + obj₍₂₎  |  Pv – obj₍₂₎ Be (Form) + seen /watched/ heard + being + v₃ + by + obj₍₁₎

items.text:
Av – I saw her watching T V .
Pv – T V was seen being watched by her.

blocks.text: Rule-36
अगर active voice में 'necessary' हो तो Passive voice में उसे required में बदलते है।

items.text:
Av – It is necessary to help him.
Pv – you are required to help him.

blocks.text: Rule - 37
अगर Active voice में 'duty' हो तो Passive voice में उसे 'supposed' में बदले।

items.text:
Av – It is your duty to help her.
Pv – you are supposed to help her.

blocks.text: Rule-38
Av – sub + verb + obj + complement  |  Pv – obj + Be (Form) + v₃ + complement

items.text:
Av – He made me king.
Pv – I was made king.

blocks.text: Rule-39
Av – sub +ask + obj + if / whether / wh - Family + Sentence  |  Pv – obj + Be (Form) + v₃ + if / whether / wh- Family + Sentence

items.text:
Av – she asked me if I had done the work.
Pv – I was asked if I had done the work.

blocks.text: Rule-40
Passive voice में 'known' के साथ 'to' का प्रयोग करे न कि 'by' का

items.text:
Av – she knows me.
Pv – I am known to her.

blocks.text: 03  Narration

When somebody says something to us and we convey the some message to a third person with change or without change, it is called narration.
जब कोई व्यक्ति हमें कुछ कहे और उसकी कही हुई बात को हम किसी अन्य व्यक्ति तक पहुचाए बिना किसी परिवर्तन के या कुछ परिवर्तन करके तो उसे narration कहते है।
**Narration** दो प्रकार के होते है **Direct speech** और **Indirect speech**.
Narration को समझने के लिए कुछ terms को समझ ले:-
**Reporting speech :** Sentence का वह भाग जो inverted commas के बाहर हो उसे Reporting speech कहते है।
**Reporting verb :** Reporting speech में जिस verb का प्रयोग होता है उसे Reporting Verb कहते है।
**Reported speech:** Sentence का वह भाग जो inverted commas के अन्दर हो उसे Reported speech कहते हैं।

items.text: Reporting speech        Reported speech
He said to me,   "I will go there"
Reporting verb

blocks.text: Direct speech से Indirect speech में change करने के लिए pronoun और Tense का rule सभी Sentences पर लागू करें:-
Rule of Pronoun

Subject, object, No change
Pronoun को   S   O   N   के अनुसार बदलें।
            1   2   3
**Note 1. :** S का अर्थ Subject, O का अर्थ Object और N का अर्थ No change है।
**Note 2. :** 1 2 3 का अर्थ Ist person , 2nd Person और 3rd Person है।
Ist person को Subject के अनुसार बदले, 2nd person को object के अनुसार बदले और 3rd person में कोई change ना करें।

items.text: **Direct -** __He__ says to __me__ " I do the work".  (sub / obj)
**Indirect -** He tells me that he does the work.
**Direct -** __he__ says to __me__ , "you do the wouk".  (sub / obj)
**Indirect -** He tells me that I do the work.
**Direct -** __he__ says to __me__ , " she does the work."  (sub / obj)
**Indirect -** He tells me that she does the work.

blocks.text: Rule of Tense

blocks.label: Rule-1
blocks.text: यदि Reporting verb Present या Future Tense में हो तो Tense को ना बदले।

items.text: **Direct -** Ram says," I do it now".
**Indirect -** Ram says that he does it now.
**Direct -** Rani will say, " I do it now."
**Indirect -** Rani will say that she does it now.

blocks.label: Rule-2A
blocks.text: यदि Reporting verb past में हो तो इन Tenses को इस प्रकार बदलें :-

blocks.label: Rule-2B
blocks.text: यदि Reporting verb past में हो तो इन words को इस प्रकार बदलें:-

rows: The following day/ The next day
The previous day/ The last day
The previous night/ The night before

blocks.text: Sentence पाँच प्रकार के होते हैं (Assertive Sentence, Interrogative Sentence, Optative Sentence, Impretive Sentence, Exclamatory Sentence) और इन्हीं Sentences को हम Direct speech से Indirect speech में change करते है।
Assertive Sentence
Positive और Negative Sentence को हम Assertive Sentence कहते है।

blocks.label: Rule-1
blocks.text: Remove comma and inverted commas and use conjunction 'that'.

blocks.label: Rule-3
blocks.text: Change of tense जैसा कि पहले discuss किया गया हैं।

blocks.label: Rule-4
blocks.text: Change of pronoun जैसा कि **Rule of Pronoun** में Discuss किया गया है।

items.text:
He said to me," I am playing now."
He told me that he was playing then.

She said to him ," you have done it today."
she told him that he had done it that day.

He said." It has been raining all day."
He said that it had been raining all day.

My mother said to me," you took meal."
My mother told me that I had taken meal.

She said to him," I shall leave you soon."
She told him that she would leave him soon.

blocks.text: Interrogative Sentence
इन Sentences में प्रश्न पूछा जाता हैं।

blocks.label: Rule-1
blocks.text: Said या Said to को asked में बदल दें।

blocks.label: Rule-2
blocks.text: यदि question की शुरूआत helping verb या modal से हो तो comma और inverted commas को हटा कर if या whether का प्रयोग करें।

blocks.label: Rule-3
blocks.text: यदि question की शुरूआत wh- Family words (when, what, how, why.) से हो तो comma और inverted commas को हटा कर किसी conjuction का प्रयोग ना करें।

blocks.label: Rule-4
blocks.text: Tense को पहले जैसा कि पहले discuss किया गया है।

blocks.label: Rule-5
blocks.text: Pronoun को पहले rule के अनुसार बदले।

items.text:
He said to me," Are you playing here."?
He asked me if I was playing there.

She said to him," why were you singing"?
She asked him why he had been singing.

He said to me, " what is your name"?
He asked me what my name was.

They said to me," Have you done this."?
They asked me if I had done that.

blocks.text: Optative Sentence
इन Sentences में इच्छा (wish) की बात होती है।
**Optative Sentence में 4 types से questions पूछे जाते है:-**
Type -1
यदि मिलना (meeting) या जाने (Departure) की बात हो तो ये rules apply करें:-

blocks.label: Rule-1
blocks.text: Said या said to को मिलने (meeting) के समय 'wished' में बदले और जाने (Departure) के समय said या said to को 'Bade' में बदलें।

blocks.label: Rule-2
blocks.text: Comma और inverted commas को हटाकर किसी conjunction का प्रयोग ना करें।

blocks.label: Rule-3
blocks.text: Sir/ madam को respectfully में बदलें।

items.text:
The student said to the teacher. " Good morning sir"!
The student respectfully wished the teacher good morning.

The girl said to her friend, " Good bye, dear friend."
The girl bade her dear friend good bye.

blocks.text: Type -2
यदि sentence की शुरूआत may या May God से हो तो rules इस प्रकार है:-

blocks.label: Rule-1
blocks.text: Said/said to को wished/blessed/prayed/ cursed में बदले।

blocks.label: Rule-2
blocks.text: Comma और inverted commas को हटाकर conjunction 'that' का प्रयोग करें।

blocks.label: Rule-3
blocks.text: May को Might में बदलें।

items.text:
She said to me," May God bless you!"
She wished me that God Might bless me.

blocks.text: Type-3
यदि Sentence की शुरूआत would that/ o that या o for से हो तो इन rules का प्रयोग करें:-

blocks.label: Rule-1
blocks.text: said / said to को wished में बदले।

blocks.label: Rule-2
blocks.text: Comma और inverted commas को हटाकर Conjunction 'that' का प्रयोग करें।

blocks.label: Rule-3
blocks.text: यदि would that/ o that / o for के साथ 'were' हो तो उसे 'had been' में बदले।

blocks.label: Rule-4
blocks.text: यदि would that / o that / o for के साथ had हो तो उसे 'had had' में बदले।

items.text:
He said," would that I were a king."
He wished that he had been a king.

He said , " o that I had the wings."
He wished that he had had the wings.

blocks.text: Type-4
यदि Sentence की शुरूआत If ------ were से हो तो इन rules का प्रयोग करें:-

blocks.label: Rule-1
blocks.text: said/ said to को wished में बदलें।

blocks.label: Rule-2
blocks.text: comma और inverted commas को हटाकर conjunction 'that' का प्रयोग करें।

blocks.label: Rule-3
blocks.text: 'were' को 'would be' में बदलें।

items.text:
He said, " If I were a king."
He wished that he would be a king.

blocks.text: Imperative Sentence
Imperative Sentences में order, request, advise etc, की बात होती है। इसके Rules इस प्रकार है:-

blocks.label: Rule-1
blocks.text: Said / Said to को ordered / requested / advised / forbade / commanded etc. में बदलें।

blocks.label: Rule-2
blocks.text: Comma और inverted commas को हटाकर 'to' का प्रयोग करें।

blocks.label: Rule-3
blocks.text: Do not को not to में बदलें।

items.text:
He said to me." Do not sit on the chair,"
He orderd me not to sit on the chair.

He said to her," please help me."
He requested her to help him.

He said to me," work hard."
He advised me to work hard.

blocks.text: Exclamatory Sentecne

Exclamatory Sentence में strong emotion (तीव्र भावना) की बात होती है।
इसके **rules** इस प्रकार है:-

blocks.label: Rule-1
blocks.text: said / said to को exclaimed with joy / sorrow / surprise / disgust / contempt etc. में बदले।

blocks.label: Rule-2
blocks.text: यदि Praise (तारीफ) की बात हो तो said / said to को applauded + someone + saying में बदले।

blocks.label: Rule-3
blocks.text: comma और inverted commas को हटाकर conjunction 'that' का प्रयोग करे।

blocks.label: Rule-4
blocks.text: what या how को very या great में बदलें।

items.text:
He said, " How beautiful the Tajmahal is!"
He exclaimed with surprise that the Tajmahal was very beautiful.

The team said , " Hurrah ! we have won the match."
The team exclaimed with joy that they had won the match.

The General said to the solders, "Bravo ! you fought bravely "
The General applauded the soldiers saying that they had fought bravely .

blocks.text: Sentence with Let
'Let' से शुरू होने वाले Sentences से three types के questions exam में पूछे जाते है:-
Type-1
यदि Let का अर्थ suggestion हो तो ये rules है:-

blocks.label: Rule-1
blocks.text: Said/said to को suggested to या proposed to में बदलें।

blocks.label: Rule-2
blocks.text: comma और inverted commas को हटाकर conjunction 'that' का प्रयोग करें।

blocks.label: Rule-3
blocks.text: Let को should में बदले।

items.text:
He said to me, " Let us play."
He suggested to me that we should play.

He said to her, " Let us not go there."
He suggested to her that we should not go there.

blocks.text: Type-2
यदि Let का अर्थ order या request हो तो ये rules है:-

blocks.label: Rule-1
blocks.text: Said / said to को ordered या requested में बदले।

blocks.label: Rule-2
blocks.text: comma और inverted commas को हटा कर 'to' का प्रयोग करें।

blocks.label: Rule-3
blocks.text: Let का अर्थ यदि order हो तो let को ना बदले।

blocks.label: Rule-4
blocks.text: Let का अर्थ यदि request हो तो let को allow या let में बदलें।

items.text:
she said to her boss," Let me go home as I am not well."
she requested her boss to allow her to go home as she was not well.

The teacher said to the peon," Let the boys go away."
The teacher ordered the peon to let the boys go away.

blocks.text: Type-3
यदि let का अर्थ supposition (अनुमान) हो तो ये rules है:-

blocks.label: Rule-1
blocks.text: Said / said to को 'told' में बदले।

blocks.label: Rule-2
blocks.text: comma और inverted commas को हटाकर conjunction 'that' का प्रयोग करें।

blocks.label: Rule-3
blocks.text: Let को 'might' में बदले।

items.text:
She said to him ," Let him work, he can not win the scholarship ."
she told him that he might work, he could not win the scholarship.

He said to her," Let them come, they can not harm me."
He told her that they might come, they could not harm him.

blocks.text: Some Miscellaneous Rules

blocks.label: Rule-1
blocks.text: यदि reported speech में newspaper या magazine के लिए we, us, our का प्रयोग हो तो उन्हें it या its में बदलें।

items.text:
The Hindu says, " We are trying our best to give our readers the latest news."
The Hindu says that it is trying its best to give its readers the latest news.

blocks.label: Rule-2
blocks.text: यदि reported speech में will, ok, you know, you see, um etc. का प्रयोग हो तो indirect speech में उन्हें हटा दें।

items.text:
Rakesh said to Nitu, " you know , I want to study now."
Rakesh told Nitu that he wanted to study then.

blocks.label: Rule-3
blocks.text: यदि reported speech में universal truth, habit, common saying, imaginary condition, idiom, past historical fact इत्यादि का वर्णन हो तो indirect speech में इनके tense को न बदलें।

items.text:
He said ," The sun is a star."
He said that the sun is a star.

They said to him," The earth moves round the sun."
They told him that the earth moves round the sun.

blocks.label: Rule-4
blocks.text: यदि reported speech में एक ही समय पर दो कार्यों के होने का वर्णन हो तो indirect speech में इनके tense को न बदलें।

items.text:
She said to me," my mother was making tea while I was playing."
she told me that her mother was making tea while she was playing.

blocks.label: Rule-5
blocks.text: यदि reported speech में had + v₃, to + v₁, would, could, should, might, must, ought to इत्यादि का वर्णन हो तो indirect speech में इनके tense को ना बदलें।

items.text:
He said to me, " I could do that."
He told me that he could do that.

blocks.label: Rule-6
blocks.text: यदि reported speech में no sooner, as soon as, when,
(Rule-6 जारी) while के बाद time clause का वर्णन हो indirect speech में उसका tense न बदले।

items.text:
Naval said, " I was good when I was working in office".
Naval said that he was good when he was working in offece.

blocks.label: Rule-7
blocks.text:
यदि reported speeh में 'yes' या 'No' का वर्णन हो तो indirect speech में उन्हें इस प्रकार बदलें:-
yes को replied in the affirmative में बदले और No को replied in the negative में बदले।

items.text:
He said to me ," can you come in? and I said, yes."
He asked me if I could come in and I replied in the affirmative.

blocks.label: Rule-8
blocks.text: यदि sentence की शुरूआत 'shall' से हो और उसमें Permission की बात हो तो shall को should में बदलें।

items.text:
He said to me," shall I lock the gate"?
He asked me if he should lock the gate.

blocks.label: Rule-9
blocks.text: यदि Sentence की शुरूआत will, would, can या could से हो और उसमें requst की बात हो तो said / said to को requested में बदले।

items.text:
He said to me," will you give me your book, please."?
He requested me to give him my book.

blocks.label: Rule-10
blocks.text: यदि reported speech में this / these का प्रयोग हो और उनका अर्थ Possession (अधिकार) हो तो inderect speech में this/ these को ना बदले।

items.text:
He said to me," This is my pen."
He told me that this was his pen.

blocks.text: 04 Subject - Verb Agreement

In a sentence verb must agree with its subject if the subject is singular, verb must also be singular and if the subject is plural, verb must also be plural. It is called subject verb agreement or syntax.
वाक्य में verb का प्रयोग subject के अनुसार करें यदि subject singular हो तो verb भी singular रहेगा और यदि subject plural हो तो verb भी Plural रहेगा इसे subject - verb Agreement या Syntax कहते हैं।
**Most Important Rules of Subject -Verb Agreement**
Rule:-1
जब दो subjects को conjunction 'or' से जोड़ा जाए तब verb का प्रयोग नजदीकी subject के अनुसार करें।

items.text: Ravi or his __his friends__ have come. (__his friends__ = Main subject)
Has __Ravi__ or his friends come? (__Ravi__ = Main subject)

blocks.text:
Note:-
1. Positive और negative sentences में जब दो subjects को conjunction 'or' से जोड़ा जाए तब दूसरा subject main subject होगा।
2. जब Intettogative sentence में जब दो subjects को 'or' से जोड़ा जाए तब पहला subject main subject होगा।
Rule-2
जब दो subjects को conjunction 'and' से जोड़ा जाए तब plural verb का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Ram and shyam have come.
you and he are players.

blocks.text: Rule-3
जब दो subjects को conjunction 'and' से जोड़ा जाए लेकिन वे एक ही व्यक्ति या वस्तु की बात करें जब singular verb का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Slow and steady wins the race.
My friend , philosopher, and guide has come.
Bread and butter is a wholesome food.

blocks.text: Rule-4
यदि article (a/an/the) का प्रयोग सिर्फ पहले subject के साथ हो तो singular verb का प्रयोग करे और यदि article का प्रयोग सभी subjects के साथ हो तो Plural verb का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: The actor and director is speaking.
The actor and the director are speaking.

blocks.text: Rule-5
जब दो subjects को इन conjunction से जोड़ा जाए तब verb का प्रयोग पहले subject के अनुसार करें:-

items: As well as, like, unlike, with, together with, along with, except, besides, including, accompanied by, rather than etc.

items.text: Ravi as well as his sons was there.
His sons as well as Ravi were there.
I with my friends am going to market.

blocks.text: Rule-6
जब दो subjects को 'not - but' या 'and not' से जोड़ा जाए तब verb का प्रयोग उस subject के अनुसार करें जिसके साथ 'not' ना हो।

items.text: Ravi and not his friends has come.
Not Ravi but his friends have come.

blocks.text:
Note-
'Not - but' में but के बाद main subject होगा और 'and not' में and के पहले main subject होगा।
Rule-7
यदि इसमें से किसी भी words का प्रयोग subject के स्थान पर हो तो verb और possessive adjective singular रहेगा:-

items: each, either, neither, every, etc.

items.text: Each __has done__ __his__ work. (__has done__ = S. V.; __his__ = singular P.A.)
I invited the two boys but neither has come yet.

blocks.text:
Note
इन्हें Possessive adjective कहते हैं:-
my, his, her, your, our, their, its, one's.
Rule- 8
इन सभी Phrases के बाद Noun या Pronoun तो plural रहेगा लेकिन verb और possessive adjective singular रहेगा:-

items: each of , either of , neither of

items.text: Each of the boys has done his work.
Niether of them was able to complete his task.

blocks.text: Rule-9
जब दो subjects को इन conjunctions से जोड़ा जाए तब verb का प्रयोग नजदीकी subject के अनुसार करें:-

items: either - or, neither - nor, not only - but also etc.

items.text: Neither the doctor nor the __nurses__ were awake. (__nurses__ = main sub)
Either you or your brother has missed it.

blocks.text: Rule-10

items: (a) more than one + S. N. + S. V.
(b) more than two/three + P.N. + P.V.
(c) more + P.N. + than one + P.V.

items.text: More than one student is good.
More than three students are good.
More students than one are good.

blocks.text: Rule-11
यदि इनमें से किसी भी word का प्रयोग subject के रूप में हो तो सामान्यत: plular verb का प्रयोग करते है।

items: all, some, most, many, both, few, etc.

items.text: some girls were studying.
many boys have come.

blocks.text:
Note:-
लेकिन यदि all , some , most के साथ uncountable noun का प्रयोग हो तो singular verb का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: all the news is false.
some money has been spent.

blocks.text: Rule-12
इन सभी Phrases के बाद noun, pronoun और verb plural रहेगा:-

items: all of, some of, most of , many of , both of , few of etc.

items.text: Most of the students were there.
Many of the girls have come.

blocks.text:
Note
लेकिन यदि all of , some of, most of के बाद uncountable noun का प्रयोग हो तो singular verb का प्रयोग करें:-

items.text: some of the luggage is here.
most of the advice is good.

blocks.text: Rule -13
इन सभी phrases के बाद noun और verb हमेशा plural रहेंगे:-

items: a number of, a large number of , large numbers of.

items.text: A number of books were bought.
Large numbers of boys have done it.

blocks.text:
Note
लेकिल "The number of ' के बाद noun plural रहेगा और verb singular रहेगा।

items.text: The number of boys is hundred.

blocks.text: Rule-14
इन सभी phrases के बाद noun और verb plural रहेंगे:-

items: a good many , a great many.

items.text: A good many men have come.
A great many trees are green.

blocks.text:
Note
लेकिन many + a/an के बाद noun और verb singlar रहेगा।

items.text: Many a man has come.

blocks.text: Rule-15
यदि इन words का प्रयोग subject के रूप में हो तो verb और possessive Adjective singular रहेगा:-

items: everybody , somebody, nobody[?], anybody, everyone, someone, no one, anyone, one etc.

items.text: Everybody is doing his work.
One must do one 's work.

blocks.text:
Note-
One का possessive Adjective हमेशा one 's होगा।
Rule-16
इन सभी phrases के बाद noun या pronoun plural रहेगा। लेकिन verb और possessive Adjective singular रहेगा:-

items: everybody of , some body of , nobody of, anybody of, someone of, anyone of, no one of, everyone of, one of etc.

items.text: Everyone of these students has done his task.
No one of them was playing.

blocks.text: Rule-17
None of के बाद noun या pronoun plural रहेगा लेकिल verb singular या plural दोनों लिख सकते है। लेकिन none of के साथ singular verb का प्रयोग बेहतर होता है।

items.text: None of them is coming.
None of them are playing.

blocks.text: Rule-18
Relative Pronoun (who/ which/ that) के ठीक बाद verb का प्रयोग relative pronoun के ठीक पहले जिस main subject का प्रयोग हुआ है उसके अनुसार करें।

items.text: My boss is one of those who have come.
I who am a teacher, teach here.

blocks.text:
Note
यदि one of के पहले 'the only' लिखा हो तो relative pronoun के बाद singular verb का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: He is the only one of the students that has come.

blocks.text: Rule-19
कुछ nouns दिखते है singular लेकिन वे plural होते है इसलिए उनके साथ plural verb का प्रयोग करें:-

items: cattle, children, police, poultry, clergy, peasantry, infantry, cavalry, the rich, the poor, the good, the bad, the needy, the brave, the blind, the intelligent, the wicked etc.

items.text: Cattle are grazing.
The rich have gathered there.

blocks.text: Rule-20
कुछ nouns दिखते है plural लेकिन वे singular होते हैं इसलिए उनके साथ singular verb का प्रयोग करें:-

items: **Name of book**
The Arabian Nights
Three Musketeers, wings of Fire etc.
**Name of games:** - billiards, draughts, darts, cards, athletics etc.
**Name of diseases :-** shingles, measles, mumps, rickets etc.
**Name of Countries : -** The united states of America, The west Indies, The Netherlands etc.

items.text: The Arabian Nights is a nice book.
The Billiards is played everywhere.

blocks.text: Rule-21
यदि Numeral Adjective + plural Noun किसी निश्चित amount, height, distance या weight की बात करे तो singular verb का प्रयोग करें और यदि वे अलग अलग चीजों की बात करें तो plural verb का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Ten thousand rupees is a good amount.
Ten thousand rupees are spent on various books.

blocks.text: Rule -22
collective noun को साथ singular verb का प्रयोग करें लेकिन यदि Collective noun में मतभेद या असहमति हो तो उनके साथ plural verb का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: The committee has taken its decision.
The committee are divided in their opinion.

blocks.text: Rule-23
यदि Gerund (v1 + ing) या Infivitive (To + v1) का प्रयोग subject के रूप मे हो तो singular verb का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Swimming is good for health.
To dance is good for health.

blocks.text: Rule-26

One third of, two thirds of, part of, five percent of, lots of, half of etc. के बाद यदि subject singular हो तो singular verb का प्रयोग करे और यदि subject plural हो तो plural verb का प्रयोग करे और यदि subject uncountable noun हो तो singular verb का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Two thirds of the students have come.
Two thirds of the pillar has rotted.
Lots of milk is exported.

blocks.text: Rule-27
A herd of, a team of, a series of, a pair of, an army of, a class of etc. के बाद noun plural रहेगा लेकिन verb singular रहेगा।

items.text: A team of players has come.
A series of lectures was to be given.

blocks.text: Rule- 28

items: A. A/The + majority of + __plural noun__ + plural verb.
B. A/The + majority + singular verb.

items.text: The majority of boys are playing.
The majority is in my favour.

blocks.text: Rule-29

यदि Economics, stats, maths और Politics का प्रयोग Subject (विषय वस्तु) के रूप में किया जाए तो singular verb का प्रयोग करें लेकिन यदि Economics का अर्थ economic condition (आर्थिक स्थिति), Maths का अर्थ calculation, stats का अर्थ data और Politics का अर्थ Political beliefs हो तो उनके साथ plural verb का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Economics is a nice subject.
Economics of this country are not good.

blocks.text: Rule-30
यदि 'I' subjects का part हो तो possessive Adjective 'our' होगा और यदि 'I' subjects का part न हो तो Possessive Adjective 'your' होगा ।

items.text: you, he and I want to express our own wish.
you and he have done your work.

blocks.text: Rule-31
यदि It, This, what या where का प्रयोग subject के रूप में हो तो singular verb का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: It is these boys who have come.
what the BJP needs is modesty.

blocks.text: Rule-32
Nothing but/ Everything but + P.N./U.N. + S. V.

items.text: Nothing but the books is needed.
Everything but your advice is required.

blocks.text: Rule-33
[boxed: **Go + Gerund**] इस Formula का प्रयोग leisure activities (मनोरंजक गतिविधियाँ) जैसे कि fishing, swimming, camping, surfing, diving, shopping , skating etc. के लिए किया जाता है।

items.text: She went shopping.
He goes swimiming daily.

blocks.text: Rule-34
इन pair words के साथ singular verb का प्रयोग करें:-

items: slow and steady, rice and curry, bread and butter, fish and chips, gun and barrel, horse and saddle, bullet and chest, truth and honesty, age and experience, crown and glory etc.

items.text: Bullet and chest is adored by the brave.
Age and experience has taught me a lot.

blocks.text: Rule-35
Little of/ A little of/the little of + U. N. + S. V.

items.text: A little of the Money was wasted.
Little of milk is exported.

blocks.text: Rule-36
There + verb + subject

items.text: There was a king
There were two kings

blocks.text: Rule-37
One or two + P.N. + P.V.

items.text: One or two girls have spoken.

blocks.text: 05 Conditional Sentence
When happening of an action depends on another action, it is called conditional Sentence
जब एक कार्य का होना किसी अन्य कार्य पर निर्भर करे तो उसे Conditional Sentence कहते हैं।
**Note:-** यदि Sentence में इनमें से किस भी Word का प्रयोग हो तो सामान्यत: Conditional Sentence का प्रयोग करते है।
If, as if , as though, provided, until, unless, when, before, after, suppose, in case, would that, o that, o for etc,
**Most Important Formulas of Conditional Sentence:-**
Rulr-1
If + present Indefinite Tense, present Indefinite Tense

items.text: If you work hard, you can easily pass.
If  Rani does it, she gets the result.

blocks.text: Rule-2
If + present Indefinite Tense, Future Indefinite Tense.

items.text: If India wins the match, we will celebrate.
when she comes here, I will go.

blocks.text: Rule-3
If + sub + were + sub , sub + would + v_1 + obj

items.text: If I were a king, I would help them.
If she were a teacher, she would teach me.

blocks.text: Rule-4

If + past perfect Tense, sub + would + have + v_3 + obj
or,
Had + sub + v_3 , sub + would + have + v_3 + obj

items.text: If I had gone to kolkata, I woud have  met her.
Had I gone to kolkata, I would have met her.

blocks.text: Rule-5
If + sub + v_2 + obj, sub + would + v_1 + obj

items.text: If she spoke the truth, she would get the compliment.
If Rani went there, she would meet them.

blocks.text: Rul -6
But for+noun, noun/pronoun+would+have+v_3

items.text: But for your help , I would have failed in the exam.
But for the doctor's support, the patient would have died.

blocks.text: Rule-7
If + Present perfect Tense, Future Indefinite Tense
**Note-** इस formula का प्रयोग तभी करे जब Sentence में कार्य खत्म (Action Complete) होने का hint हो।

items.text: After the investigation has finished, we will come to know the truth.
After the meeting has got over, I will meet you.

blocks.text: Rule-8
किसी भी Conditional word (if /as if/when/after, provided etc.) के साथ shall/will का प्रयोग ना करे।

items.text: when you come here, I will go.
If I see you , I will talk to you.

blocks.text: 06 Question Tag
When we confirm any statement, it is called question tag.
जब हम किसी कथन की पुष्टि करते है तो उसे question tag कहते है। Question Tag बनाने के two formula है।
**Formula-1:**
HV + n't + sub ?
**Note:** इस formula का प्रयोग positive sentence में करें।
**Formula-2:**
HV + sub ?
**Note:** इस formula का प्रयोग negative sentence में करें।
**Note:** Question tag में subject के स्थान पर सिर्फ pronoun का प्रयोग करें।

items.text:
She works carefully.
Q.T ⇒ doesn't she?

blocks.text: **Note:** जो tense हो उसी के helping verb का प्रयोग question tag में करें। चूंकि sentence (she works carefully) positive है इसलिए negative tag का प्रयोग करेंगे और sentence present indefinte tense में है इसलिए she के साथ helping verb does का प्रयोग करेंगे।

items.text:
She had done the work.
Q.T – Hadn't she ?

Ravi is playing chess.
Q.T – Isn't he ?

Ravi has not done it.
Q.T – Has he?

She talked to me.
Q.T – Didn't she?

blocks.text: Question tag बनाने के लिए कुछ important tips:-
**Tip-1** यदि sentence में इनमें से किसी भी word का प्रयोग हो तो sentence negative होगा और उसमें positive tag का प्रयोग करें:-
no, not, none, never, nobody, no one, nothing, hardly, scarcely, barely, rarely, seldom, little, few etc.

items.text:
He hardly plays chess.
Q.T – does he ?

They seldom helped me.
Q.T – Did they ?

I have little money.
Q.T– Have I ?

She gave me few rupees.
Q.T – Did she ?

blocks.text: **Note:-** लेकिन यदि a little या a few हो तो sentence positive होगा और उसमें negative tag का प्रयोग करें।

items.text:
I have a little money.
Q.T – Haven't I ?

She has a few books
Q. T – Has't she ?

blocks.text: **Tip-2:** यदि इनमें से किसी भी word का प्रयोग subject के स्थान पर हो तो question tag में helping verb और subject (pronoun) plural रखेगा।
each, either, neither, none, everybody, somebody, nobody, anybody, everyone, someone, noone, anyone, etc.

items.text:
Each boy is happy.
Q.T- Aren't they ?

Everybody has come.
Q.T- Haven't they?

Nobody was there.
Q.T- were they ?

Noone has come yet.
Q.T Have they ?

blocks.text: **Note:**

items: उन सभी words (each, either everyone etc.) के लिए question tag में 'they' का प्रयोग subject के रूप में करें।
Example 3 और 4 negative sentence है इसलिए उनमें positive tag का प्रयोग हुआ है।

blocks.text: **Tips-3:** Let + us से शुरू होने वाले sentence में question tag का answer 'shall we' होगा।

items.text:
Let us play cricket.
Q.T – shall we ?

Let us not go there.
Q.T- shall we ?

blocks.text: **Tip-4:** Let के साथ us को छोड़कर यदि किसी अन्य subject (name, he, she, etc.) का प्रयोग हो तो Question tag का answer 'will you' होगा।

items.text:
Let her play.
Q.T- will you?

Let them do it.
Q.T will you?

blocks.text: **Tips-5:** यदि sentence में there, this, that, these, those
etc. का प्रयोग subject के रूप में हो तो questin tag में उनहें इस प्रकार लिखें।

items.text:
There was a king.
Q.T- wasn't there?

This is a pen.
Q.T- Isn't it ?

Those have come.
Q.T-Haven't they ?

blocks.text: यदि इन words का प्रयोग subject के रूप में हो तो question tag में इनके लिए subject 'it' का प्रयोग करें।
everything, something, nothing, anything

items.text:
Everything is good.
Q.T- Isn't it ?

Nothing is bad.
Q.T- Is it ?

blocks.text: यदि Imperative sentence (आदेशात्मक वाक्य) positive में हो तो question tag में उसका answer 'will you' या 'won't you' दोनों हो सकता है। लेकिन यदि Imperative sentence negative में हो तो question tag में उसका answer 'will you' होगा।

items.text:
Close the door.
Q.T- Will you?/won't you?

Please sign this letter?
Q.T- will you?/won't you?

Don't go there.
Q.T- will you?

blocks.text: **Note:** नाराजगी या गुस्सा जताने के लिए imperative sentence में question tag का answer can't you होगा।

items.text:
Shut your mouth.
Q.T- Can't you?

blocks.text: यदि subject-all of, some of, most of, any of, every one of, either of neither of, one of etc है। तो question tag में उनका subject of के बाद वाला होगा।

items.text:
One of you has come.
Q.T- haven't you?

Neither of them was there.
Q.T- were  they?

blocks.text: यदि sentence में used to का प्रयोग हो तो question tag में उसके लिए 'did' का प्रयोग helping verb के रूप में करें।

items.text:
She used to play.
Q.T- Didn't she?

blocks.text: 07 Conjunction
Conjunction is a word or group of words that joins two sentences, phrases or words.
Conjunction शब्द या शब्दों का वह समूह है जो दो वाक्यों, phrases या शब्दों को जोड़ने का कार्य करता है।
**Most Important Rules of Conjunction**
Rule-1

**'Either'** के साथ सिर्फ 'or' का प्रयोग करें।
Either - or

items.text: Either you or your mother has come.
His brother has bought either a pen or a pencil.

blocks.text: Rule-2

Nither के साथ सिर्फ 'nor' का प्रयोग करें।
Neither - nor

items.text: Neither Ravi nor Akmal has come.
He is neither stupid nor careless.

blocks.text: Rule-3
Hardly या Scarcely के साथ when या Before का प्रयोग करें।
Hardly या Scarcely के Part में Past Perfect Tense का प्रयोग होता है और when या before के Part में Past Indefinite Tense का प्रयोग होता है।
**Formula**

1. Sub + had + hardly/Scarcely + v_3 + when / before + sub + v_2
2. Hardly/Scarcely + had + sub + v_3 + when / before + sub + v_2

items.text: He had hardly reached his house when it started raining.
Hardly had he reached his house when it started raining.

blocks.text: Rule-4

Although या though के साथ सिर्फ yet या, (comma) का प्रयोग करें।
Although /Though - yet/,

items.text: Although he came late yet he got the chance.
Though they did not help us, we supported them.

blocks.text: **Note-** Reason (कारण) बताने के लिए although या though का प्रयोग बिना yet या, (comma) के कर सकते है उसी प्रकार result (परिणाम) बताने के लिए yet का प्रयोग बिना although या though के कर सकते हैं।

items.text:
He worked hard __Yet he failed__
Result

He failed __though he worked hard__
Reason

blocks.text: Rule-5
No sooner के साथ सिर्फ 'than' का प्रयोग करें।
No sooner के Part में Past Indefinite और Past Perfect दोनों tense का प्रयोग कर सकते हैं लेकिन than के Part में सिर्फ Past Indefinite Tense का प्रयोग करें।
**Formulas**

1. No sooner + had + sub + v_3 + than + sub + v_2
2. No sooner + did + sub + v_1 + than + sub + v_2

items.text: No sooner had he spoken than they came.
No sooner did he speak than they came.

blocks.text:
**Note**
No sooner के साथ past Indefinite Tense का प्रयोग बेहतर होता हैं।
Rule-6

Whether के साथ सिर्फ or का प्रयोग करें।
whether - or

items.text: She asked me whether I would go there or not.
He does not know whether they will help him or not.

blocks.text:
**Note:**
यदि whether के पहले doubt या doubtful लिखा हो तो whether के साथ or का प्रयोग ना करें।

items.text: He doubts whether she will go there.

blocks.text: Rule-7
As या So के साथ सिर्फ as का प्रयोग करें।
As - As का प्रयोग Positive और Negative दोनों Sentences में कर सकते है।

So - As का प्रयोग सिर्फ Negative Sentence में करें।
As - As
So - As

items.text: she is as good as I.
she is not as good as I.
He is not so cool as we.

blocks.text: **Note**

items: Negative Sentence में So - As का प्रयोग बेहतर होता है।
As या So के बाद Adjective के Positive Degree का प्रयोग करें।

blocks.text: Rule-8

Both के साथ सिर्फ and का प्रयोग करें।
Both - And

items.text: Ravi is both intelligent and laborious.

blocks.text: Rule-9
Because, since या As के बाद so, thus, hence, या therefore का  प्रयोग ना करे।

items.text: Because you came lete , you failed to see us.
As he was ill, he could not attend the meeting.

blocks.text: Rule-10

not या never के साथ सिर्फ or का प्रयोग करें।
Not / never - or

items.text: I have never spoken or helped him.
We did not see the Tajmahal or visit Agra.

blocks.text: Rule-11

Else के साथ सिर्फ but का प्रयोग करें।
Else - but

items.text: He did not speak anything else but the turth.

blocks.text: Rule-12
So के साथ सिर्फ that का प्रयोग करें।

So - that/so that को Positive और Negative दोनों Sentences में लिख सकते है।
So - that
So that

items.text: He is so weak that he cannot walk.
They worked so hard that they could excel in the company.
He did the work so that he could get the money.

blocks.text:
**Note:-**
जब so that को negative sentence में प्रयोग करते है तो उसे too - to से भी लिख सकते हैं।

items.text: He is so weak that he cannot walk.
He is too weak to walk.

blocks.text: Rule-13
*Until / Unless*
Until का प्रयोग time के लिए और unless का प्रयोग action के लिए होता है।
जब wait, stay, signal या separation की बात हो तो सिर्फ until का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: I want to stay  here until he returns.
Unless you work hard, you will not get success.

blocks.text: Rule -14
The same के साथ that या as का प्रयोग करें।

The same के साथ सिर्फ that का प्रयोग करें यदि that के बाद एक verb हो और the same के साथ as का प्रयोग करें यदि as के बाद verb ना हो।
The same - That
The same -As

items.text: He is the same boy that helped me.
This is the same book as yours.

blocks.text: Rule-15
*when / while*
when - जब एक action के खत्म होने के बाद दूसरा action शुरू हुआ था तब when का प्रयोग करें।
while - जब दो actions एक साथ एक ही समय पर हुए थे तब while का प्रयोग करें।
**Formulas**

1. when + past Indefinite, past Indefinite
2. when + past Indefinite, past Continuous
3. when + past Indefinite, past perfect
4. while + past continuous, past Continuous
5. while + past continuous, past Indefinite

items.text: when the cock crew, the farmers woke up.
when I came, she had gone.
while I was playing, she was singing.
while he was studying, she came.

blocks.text: Rule-16
किसी भी wh - Family words (when, what, where, why, how etc,) के पहले and या that का प्रयोग ना करें।

items.text: He asked me why I had gone.
He is a good boy who is my friend.

blocks.text: Rule -17
Doubt या Doubtful के साथ if, whether या that का प्रयोग करें।

Positive sentence में doubt या doubtful के साथ if या whether का प्रयोग करें। और negative sentence में doubt या doubtful के साथ that का प्रयोग करें।
Doubt/Doubtful - If/ whether
Doubt/Doubtful - that

items.text: He doubts if she will help him.
He is not doubtful that she will help him.

blocks.text: Rule-18

The reason या The reason why के साथ सिर्फ that का प्रयोग करें।
The reason - that
The reason why - that

items.text: The reason he went there is that he was free.
The reason why he did not attend the meeting is that he was busy.

blocks.text: Rule - 19

Seldom के साथ if ever या or never का प्रयोग करें।
Seldom - if ever
Seldom - or never

items.text: He seldom if ever hurt me.
They seldom or never returned a beggar from their door.

blocks.text:
**Note:-**
यदि sentence की शुरूआत seldom if ever या or never से हो तो इस formula का प्रयोग करें:-
seldom if ever/seldom or never+Hv+sub+mv + ---

items.text: seldom if ever did she help me.

blocks.text: Rule-20
So as का प्रयोग उद्देश्य बताने के लिए कर सकते हैं।

items.text: He comes here so as to influence my mother.

blocks.text: Rule-21

Such के साथ that का प्रयोग कर सकते हैं।
Such-that

items.text: Such was his behaviour that everybody disliked him.

blocks.text: Rule-22

Such के साथ as का प्रयोग कर सकते हैं।
Such - as

items.text: There is no such country as you mention.

blocks.text: Rule-23

Rather या other के साथ than का प्रयोग करें।
Rather/ other - than.

items.text: I have no other desire than help my students.
He would rather speak than write.

blocks.text: Rule-24
Adjective + though/as + sentence
इस formula में although का प्रयोग ना करें।

items.text: Rich though Ravi is, he is greedy.
Tired as she was, she did not stop working.

blocks.text: Rule-25
It + is + period of time + since + past Indefinite

items.text: It is ten years since your uncle Supported us.
It is five hours since she came.

blocks.text: Rule-26
'For' का प्रयोग conjunction के रूप में additional information (अधिक जानकारी) के लिए कर सकते है।
For का प्रयोग sentence के beginning (प्रारंभ) में ना करें।

items.text: The days are long for it is july.
He did not go there for he was ill.

blocks.text: Rule-27

But
But के three rules हैं।
Rule-A
But का प्रयोग Contrary to expectation (उम्मीद के विपरीत) के लिए किया जाता है।

items.text: He cut his finger but did not weep.
Music is a science but singing is an art.

blocks.text: Rule-B
But का प्रयोग only (केवल) के रूप में कर सकते है।

items.text: He came here but an hour  ago.

blocks.text: Rule-C
But का प्रयोग Negative clause के बाद भी कर सकते हैं।

items.text: No one but the brave deserve the honour.

blocks.text: Rule-28

However
However के two rules हैं।
Rule-A
However और but का प्रयोग sentence में एक साथ ना करे।

items.text: He did not succeed however he did not bother.

blocks.text: Rule-B
Adverb of Manner का प्रयोग however के ठीक बाद करें।

items.text: However hard he tries, he will not get the prize.

blocks.text: Rule-29:

Ago के साथ that का प्रयोग करें।
Ago ------- that

items.text: It was ten months ago that I talked to her.

blocks.text: Rule-30:
'As' का प्रयोग sbject के लिए और 'like' का प्रयोग object के लिए करें।

items.text: Nobody knows her as I do.
I don't like a woman like her.

blocks.text: **Note:** As के बाद sentence में verb जरूर आयेगा लेकिन like के बाद verb नही आयेगा।
Rule-31:

Lest के साथ should का प्रयोग करें।
Lest ----------should
**Note:**

items: Lest ---- should वाले sentence में not का प्रयोग ना  करें।
Old english में lest को बिना should के present indefinite tense में लिख सकते हैं।

items.text: He ran fast lest he should miss the trian.
Walk carefully lest you fall

blocks.text: Rule-32:
किसी भी wh-family word (when, what, where, how etc) के पहले as to का प्रयोग ना करें।

items.text: He asked me why I had helped her.

blocks.text: Rule-33:
यदि sentence में to + v_1 (normal infinitive) का प्रयोग हो तो उसके पहले whether का प्रयोग करे न कि if का

items.text: We discussed whether to go there.

blocks.text: Rule-34:
यदि sentence में preposition का प्रयोग हो तो उसके बाद whether का प्रयोग करे ना कि if का।

items.text: There is a discussion [over] Whether she should go there.

blocks.text: As soon as के साथ सिर्फ comma (,) का प्रयोग करें।

**Formula** (1) As soon as + past indefinite, past indefinite
(2) As soon as + past perfect, past indefinte

items.text: As soon as she came here, they went.
As soon as she had talked to her mother, her husband came.

blocks.text: 08 Noun
The name of a place, person or thing is called noun.
किसी व्यक्ति, वस्तु या स्थान के नाम को noun कहते हैं।
Noun दो प्रकार का होता है countable noun और uncountable noun.
**Countable noun:** Countable noun उसे कहते है जिसे गिना (count) जा सकता है।
Countable noun तीन प्रकार का होता है:

items: (a) Common noun
(b) Proper noun
(c) Collective noun

blocks.text: **Uncountable noun:** Uncountable noun उसे कहते है जिसे गिना (count) नहीं जा सकता है।
Uncountable noun दो प्रकार का होता है।

items: (a) Material noun
(b) Abstract noun

blocks.text: Noun chapter से exam में दो प्रकार से question पुछा जाता है noun and case और noun and number से।
Noun and Case
Noun and case chapter से मुख्यत: 'S से question पुछा जाता है। सामान्यत: 'S का प्रयोग सजीव (living) के लिए किया जाता है। जैसे Ram's book
or
The book of Ram.
'S के कुछ important rules:-
सामान्यत: 'S का प्रयोग man और animal के साथ किया जाता है।

items.text: Ravi's book is there.
Dog's life.

blocks.text: Non-living things (निर्जीव चीजों) के साथ 'S का प्रयोग कर सकते है यदि उन्हें living (सजीव) के रूप में दर्शाया जाए।

items.text: Nobody can escape from mountain's wrath
He is fortune's favourite

blocks.text: Non-living को living के रूप में दर्शाने को personification (मानवीकरण) कहते है।
जब दो noun closely related (घनिष्ट संबंधित) हो तो 'S का प्रयोग अंतिम noun के साथ करें।

items.text: Roy, Dutt and Sarkar's film.
Vina and Rajni's joint Account.

blocks.text: Compound noun के अंतिम word के साथ 'S का प्रयोग कर सकते है।

items.text: The prince of Persia's wife has come.
His son-in-law's appointment.

blocks.text: Unit of money (पैसे की इकाई) के साथ 'S का प्रयोग करें यदि value या worth लिखा हो।

items.text: A rupee's value in nothing.
A dollar's worth in very high.

blocks.text: Unit of weight (भार की इकाई) के साथ 'S का प्रयोग करें यदि weight शब्द लिखा हो।

items.text: A gram's weight is negligible.
A ton's weight is too heavy for anyone to carry on his head.

blocks.text: हम each-other और one-another के साथ 'S का प्रयोग कर सकते है।

items.text: The two boys rectified each other's mistakes.
The three sisters were holding one another's hands.

blocks.text: **Note:** Each other का प्रयोग दो के लिए और one-another का प्रयोग दो से अधिक के लिए होता है।
इन words के साथ 'S का प्रयोग कर सकते है:- everybody, somebody, nobody, anybody, everybody, someone, anyone etc.

items.text: Cricket is everybody's game.
someone's purse is there.

blocks.text: **Exception:** लेकिन यदि उन words के साथ 'else' लिखा हो तो 'S का प्रयोग else के साथ करें।

items.text: You know it well that your success in life depends not on my advice but on someone else's

blocks.text: यदि किसी noun का अन्तिम अक्षर (last letter) S हो तो S के बाद सिर्फ (apostrophe) का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Students' common room
Ass' bray.

blocks.text: Time denoting (समय को सूचित) words के साथ 'S का प्रयोग कर सकते है।

items.text: A week's holiday is not sufficient for our children.
A year's gap is not good in any profession.

blocks.text: Space (जगह को दर्शाना) indicating words के साथ 'S का प्रयोग कर सकते है।

items.text: The razor's edge is very sharp.
A hair's breadth.

blocks.text: Dignified objects (आदरणीय वस्तुओं) के साथ 'S का प्रयोग कर सकते है।

items.text: I thought that it was heaven's will.
The court's decree.
Truth's triumph is inevitable.

blocks.text: इन phrases में 'S का प्रयोग करते है।

items: (a) At wit's end
(b) Heart's content
(c) At finger's end
(d) Journey's end
(e) Out of harm's way
(f) In mind's eye
(g) At the water's edge

items.text: She is at her wit's end.
We are now out of harm's way.

blocks.text: 'Sake' से खत्म (end) होने वाले phrase को साथ 'S का प्रयोग करें।

items: (a) For conscience' sake
(b) For justice' sake
(c) For goodness' sake
(d) For jesus' sake
(e) For acauaintance' sake
(f) For name's sake
(g) For mercy's sake

items.text: Please forgive me for Jesus' sake.
They helped me for acquintance' sake

blocks.text: **Note:** अगर कोई भी word जिसमें अन्त में 'S हो या जिसका उच्चारण sh या सिर्फ (apostrophe) का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Goondess' sake
Conscience' sake

blocks.text: बिना head word के 'S का प्रयोग कर सकते है यदि business centre, house, shop, residence, school, college church, hospital etc.

items.text: She went to doctor's
or
She went to doctor's chamber
Recently, he went to his uncle's
or,
Recenly, he went to his uncle's house.

blocks.text: **Note:-** 'S के बाद के noun को head word कहते है।
Ram's __book__ (head word)
The + noun + of + noun

items.text: The uncle of Ram has come.

blocks.text: Noun and Number
Noun and number chapter में हम मुख्यत: Singular Noun, Plural Noun और Uncountable Noun के बारे में पढ़ते है।
Exam में पूछे जाने वाले कुछ Important Nouns का Singular और Plural इस प्रकार है:-

blocks.text: Some Important Rules of Noun and Number
कुछ nouns हमेशा ही uncountable रहते हैं। उनके साथ s/es या a/an का प्रयोग ना करें:-

Luggage, baggage, scenary, machinery, poetry, beauty, honesty, wood, food, grass, information, improvement, news, money, advice, work, furniture, practice, paper, equipment, alphabet, mischief, soap, music, traffic, knowledge, crockery, stationery, hair, jewellery, evidence, bread, stone, brick, admiration, applause, chalk, chocolate, conduct, debris, gratitude, breakage, research, status, travel, violence, damage, dosage, percentage, postage, cutlery, liberty, rubbish, nonsense et,

items.text: This place is known for its scenic beauty.
She went there with her luggage.

blocks.text: **Exception-1**

items.text: stone या brick का प्रयोग यदि construction (निर्माण) के लिए हो तो वे uncountable noun है अन्यथा वे countable noun है।
This house is made of stone.
He was throwing stones.

blocks.text: **Exception-2** waters एक अलग शब्द है जिसका अर्थ है sea boundary.

items.text: He was caught in Indian waters.

blocks.text: **Exception - 3** Beauties एक अलग शब्द है जिसका अर्थ beautiful girls होता है।

items.text: Some beauties are going there.

blocks.text: **Exception - 4** Works एक अलग शब्द है जिसका अर्थ Literary Creations (साहित्यिक रचनाएँ) होता है।

items.text: The works of Shakespeare are immortal.

blocks.text: **Exception - 5** Hair का प्रयोग अगर total के अर्थ में हो तो वह uncountable noun है लेकिन यदि दो या चार hair की बात हो तो वह countable noun है।

items.text: His hair is grey.
Two hairs on his head are grey.

blocks.text: कुछ noun हमेशा plural रहते है। उनके साथ plural verb का प्रयोग करें

Police, cattle, riches, odds, alms, tongs, pincers, forceps, scissors, binoculars, spectacles, goggles, glasses, pants, patloons, pyjamas, jeans, shoes, socks, laces, gloves, amends, annals, archieves, arrears, auspices, bitters, bowels, gallows, breakables, bygones, confines, premises, congratulations, compliments, thanks, circumstances, dues, doings, earnings, eatables, edibles, embers, entrails, fetters, tethers, greens, handcuffs, movables, immovables, manes, nuptialas, proceeds, repairs, remains, sundries, surroundings, valuables, belongings, whereabouts, tidings, vegetables, winnings, ashes, pliers, goods, contents, regards etc.

items.text: He has bought a pair of shoes.

Police have come.
Your jeans are very attractive.

blocks.text: **Note:-** किसी भी dress या instrument को use करने के लिए a pair of का प्रयोग ना करें।

items.text: He is wearing a pair of jeans (✗)
He is wearing Jeans (✓)

blocks.text: कुछ nouns singular और plural दोनों होते हैं:- deer, sheep, fish, public, innings, team, series, aircraft, barracks, crossroads, vermin, offspring, headquaters, salmon etc.

items.text: Sachin has played an innings.
Five deer are there.

blocks.text: **Note-** Noun and number chapter में 50% to 60% question मुख्यत: starting के three rules (Rule -1, 2, 3) से आये हैं।
Brother का plural brothers और brethren भी होता है लेकिन उनका अर्थ इस प्रकार हैं:-

items: Brothers - Sons of same parents
Brethren - Members of same society

items.text: Ram and shyam are brothers.

blocks.text: cloth का plural cloths और clothes भी होता है लेकिन उनका अर्थ इस प्रकार हैं:-

items: cloths - pieces of cloth
clothes - Dress/ Readymade garments

items.text: I have bought clothes from a readymade shop.
I have bought cloths and going to get them tailored.

blocks.text: इन words का प्रयोग masculine gender (पुरुष) के रूप में करें:- sun, summer, winter, Time, death, ocean, wind, war, thunder etc.

items.text: Time is moving in his chariot majestically.
Death knows that I am more dangerous than he.

blocks.text: इन words का प्रयोग Feminine gender (महिला) के रूप में करें:- charity, hope, jealousy, earth, moon, spring, nature, peace, etc.

items.text: Nature offers her lap to those who seek it.
The earth has many secrets in her bowels.

Grounds - Reasons (P. N.)

Irons - chain / Fetters (P. N.)

items.text: The ground is wet (Earth)
The grounds of his arrest are not clear. (Reasons)

Quarters - Lodgings (रहना)

Peanuts - Less amount - कम पैसा

blocks.text: यदि किसी country का प्रयोग geographical unit (भूभाग) के रूप में हो तो उसके लिए it या its का प्रयोग करे लेकिन यदि किसी country का प्रयोग economic (आर्थिक) या political (राजनीतिक) इकाई के रूप में हो तो उसके लिए she या her का प्रयोग करें।

items.text: Japan is an island. It is in Asia.
Japan is proud of her achievement.

Colours - Types of colour (रंगों के प्रकार)
Colours - Flag (ध्वज)
Custom - Habit (आदत)
Customs - Tax (कर)

items.text: How many colours are there in a rainbow?
We must respect our colours.
Your custom is bad.
He has joined the customs department.

Premises - Statements
Premises - Boundary
Wood - Material (लकड़ी)
Woods - Jungle

Airs - घमंड (pride)
Foot (S. N.) - Leg - पाँव

blocks.text: Noun + preposition + Noun
इन formula में यदि दोनों noun same है तो दोनों noun singular रहेंगे और उनका verb भी singular रहेगा।

items.text: Town after town was devastated.
Ship after ship has come.

blocks.text: A / An + S . N. + and + A half / one + and + A half + P. N,

items.text: A kilo and a half
One and a half kilos.

blocks.text: Adjective का plural ना बनाये।

items.text: __Five hundred rupees__ note (Adjective)
__Two hour long__ journey (Adjective)
__Five star__ hotel (Adjective)

blocks.text: Hunting (शिकार) में जानवर का नाम Singular रहेगा।

items.text: Ravi went to hunt lion.

blocks.text: इन compound nouns को हमेशा plural noun के रूप में treat करें:- human rights, current affairs, armed forces, natural resources, industrial relations, social studies etc.

items.text: Armed forces have gathered.
Natural resources are scarce.
she is my cousin.
